prose.title: 12c mos
prose.body: The term "12C MOS" typically refers to the 12C Military Occupational Specialty within the United States Army. The 12C MOS is the Bridge Crewmember, responsible for operating and maintaining bridge erection boats and fixed bridges. Bridge Crewmembers play a crucial role in the construction and operation of military bridges, ensuring safe river crossings for troops and equipment.
